# ==============================================================================
# Project: Uncovering the Hidden Drivers of Student Depression: A Data Science Approach Using Lifestyle and
# Behavioral Patterns
# Section: H, Finalterm Project, Group 8
# Dataset: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/hopesb/student-depression-dataset
# ==============================================================================


# List of only the required packages used in the script
packages <- c("ggplot2", "dplyr", "readr", "corrplot", "moments")

# Install any packages that are not already installed
installed_packages <- rownames(installed.packages())
for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!(pkg %in% installed_packages)) {
    install.packages(pkg)
  }
}

# Load necessary libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(moments)
